infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: RiderLens uses the camera to record short bike technique clips for coaching feedback.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: RiderLens may record audio with bike technique clips.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: RiderLens lets you upload existing bike technique clips for analysis.
infoPlist.NSMotionUsageDescription: RiderLens uses motion sensors for the level and inclinometer tool.
